_comment: Gemini CLI auto-ship hooks — NOT active in this repo. Gemini only auto-discovers hooks/hooks.json from the extension root, but Claude Code also reads that root file and its loader rejects Gemini's AfterAgent/BeforeAgent/AfterTool event keys (claude plugin validate fails), so the two cannot share one repo (see docs/gemini.md). This file is therefore a ready-to-use template: for a Gemini-ONLY install of autogit, copy it to hooks/hooks.json in the extension root. ${extensionPath} is Gemini's extension-directory variable; ship.sh/busy.sh re-derive the real root from their own path regardless.
